description: Reference MCP profile for portfolio governance repo local development.

dev.description: Local IDE and cloud-agent dry runs against localhost or mocks.

filesystem.notes: Read-only workspace access for agent tooling smoke tests.

staging.description: Shared staging workers with staging-scoped credentials.

github.notes: Staging token only; never reuse production credentials.

production.description: Approved release workflows only; operator gate required.

deploy.notes: Disabled by default until operator enables per release.
